LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT'S BENJAMIN BODEA, CALIFORNIA ACUPUNCTURE BOARD'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. (SEE CODE CIV. PROC., 430.10(A) & (E).) (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S NOTES/TRANSCRIPT) ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Nov-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Huang, Esq. 510-797-7990 of John N. Kitta & Associates for Petitioner.
Caitlin Ross, Deputy Attorney General, 415-510-3615 of the Office of the Attorney General for Respondent BENJAMIN BODEA, CALIFORNIA ACUPUNCTURE BOARD.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff argues, cites GC 11508. Defendant responds there is no statutory Source. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENT BENJAMIN BODEA, CALIFORNIA ACUPUNCTURE BOARD's DEMURRER TO PETITION of MIN LI DAO LIANG FOR FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Respondents California Acupuncture Board and Benjamin Bodea's demurrer to complaint is sustained without leave to amend. (See Code Civ. Proc., 430.10(a) & (e).)

(see word minutes for full details) (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
